steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference in umami intensity between two seaweeds: winged kelp (moderate umami) and arame (high umami). The correct choice must contrast the two levels, making clear that arame's umami is stronger.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: Does not clearly establish that arame's umami is greater than winged kelp's. ✗
  • Choice B: Directly contrasts the two seaweeds by stating that while winged kelp has moderate umami, arame's is more intense — precisely the difference the student wants to highlight. ✓
  • Choice C: Does not frame the comparison as a contrast between the two intensities. ✗
  • Choice D: Does not emphasize that arame exceeds winged kelp in umami strength. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
